creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kevans
Date: Wed Sep 30 00:13:10 UTC 2020
New revision: 550633
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/550633

Log:
  sysutils/reptyr: update to 0.8.0

  This update includes support for reptyr -T on FreeBSD, along with a flurry
  of fixes for running on FreeBSD and all patches from the ports tree have
  been applied upstream.

  PR:		249994
  Approved by:	andoriyu@gmail.com (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/reptyr/Makefile
  head/sysutils/reptyr/distinfo
  head/sysutils/reptyr/files/
